transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, main Priya hoon Supreme Petrochemicals se.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan main hi dekhta hoon, lekin abhi hum stocked hain, naya supplier nahi chahiye

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Kabhi review karte hain to humein bata sakte hain?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Theek hai, agle quarter review karenge, tab dekhenge
